name: stem-career-path-ai-era
description: A Code For Good static landing-page project that introduces the **STEM Graduates Career Path - AI Era** initiative, explains its eight-pillar readiness pathway, and provides clear calls to action for program sign-up and donations. Students currently in school are expected to spend 12-18 months completing the program, while recent graduates are expected to spend 8-12 weeks completing the program.
